since_last: 72% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.79%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +0.48% · Gold -1.47% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 72% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.79%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.79%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +13.54%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +13.54%, CEVA +10.71%, INTC +10.64%, SMCI +10.37%, LSCC +9.91%. Laggards: INOD -6.85%, IBM -5.05%, WDAY -4.02%, SPCX -3.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.56% at $185.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: MRVL moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: MRVL is +7.27% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
